title: Effect of indexing errors
doc_html:
§9-517.  Effect of indexing errors

The failure of the filing office to transmit or the secretary of state to index a record correctly does not affect the effectiveness of the filed record.

Acts 2001, No. 128, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
doc_text:
§9-517.  Effect of indexing errors
The failure of the filing office to transmit or the secretary of state to index a record correctly does not affect the effectiveness of the filed record.
Acts 2001, No. 128, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
